message:
Improve Hero section mobile responsiveness and touch targets

Enhance the hero section for better mobile experience:

Touch-friendly sizing:
- Increase search input height on mobile (h-14 vs h-12 on desktop)
- Add min-h-[48px] to CTA buttons for reliable touch targets
- Add touch-manipulation to interactive elements to disable
  300ms tap delay on mobile browsers

Responsive typography:
- Scale down stats from text-3xl to text-2xl on mobile
- Reduce stat labels from text-sm to text-xs on mobile
- Adjust divider height (h-10 mobile, h-12 desktop)

Layout improvements:
- Reduce horizontal gap between stats (gap-6 mobile, gap-8 desktop)
- Add horizontal padding (px-2) to search form on mobile
- Make CTA buttons full-width on mobile (w-full sm:w-auto)

CLI command display:
- Show shortened URL on mobile: "curl jfp.com/install.sh | bash"
- Show full URL on desktop: "curl jeffreysprompts.com/install.sh | bash"
- Use hidden/sm:inline pattern for responsive text swapping

Search bar refinements:
- Hide keyboard shortcut indicator on mobile (hidden sm:flex)
- Adjust input text size (text-base mobile, text-sm desktop)
- Reduce right padding on mobile to maximize input width

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
